items.title: PSLQ on 15-element basis blind-spot for simple rationals
items.summary: mpmath.pslq applied to a 15-element basis (1, pi, pi^2, log2, zeta(2), zeta(3), sqrt(2,3,5), e, gamma, log3, pi*log2, pi^2, pi^3) sometimes returns None for trivially rational L (e.g., L=4.2 expecting [-5,21,0,...]) because the basis contains near-relations among elements at finite precision.
items.fix: classify() runs pslq([L, 1]) as a cheap pre-check before the full-basis call; only falls through to full PSLQ when L is not rational.
items.impact: Rat count rose from 10 to 13 once the rational pre-check was added; verdict (CONFIRMED-BY-EXAMPLE) unchanged.

items.title: L = 0 edge case in family (-2, 5, -3, 3, 0)
items.summary: Family (-2,5,-3,3,0) evaluates to L = 0 to 40 significant digits. mpmath.pslq([0, 1]) refuses the zero entry and returns None, so the rational pre-check originally let the family fall through to full PSLQ which also rejected it; family was provisionally classified Trans.
items.fix: classify() now returns Rat = [1, 0, ...] immediately whenever |L| < 1e-50.
items.impact: One family per sample reclassified Trans -> Rat; verdict unchanged.

items.title: Step 5 (Gamma_0(2) / G_q consistency) deferred to documentary check
items.summary: P-08 result JSONs not located in the local session tree; full numerical Gamma_0(2) rerun across G_q in {2,4,5,6,8} would require rederiving the per-group rho-formulas locally.
items.fix: None — Step 5 recorded as documentary in handoff.md section 4. UMB Section 3 PSL_2(Z)-uniqueness claim remains supported by the published P-08 record cited in UMB bibliography.
items.impact: No effect on UMB-RES-EXTEND-PROJ verdict; flagged for follow-up if user requests numerical re-execution.
